Taxonomy_x: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Cnidaria; Anthozoa; Hexacorallia; Corallimorpharia; Discosomidae; Rhodactis
Description: Rhodactis osculifera genome assembly, chromosome: 4
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Cnidaria; Anthozoa; Hexacorallia; Corallimorpharia; Discosomidae; Rhodactis
Assembly: The assembly jaRhoOscu1.1 is based on 69x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Aquatic Symbiosis Genomics Project (https://www.aquaticsymbiosisgenomics.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 2 (16,394 - 19,092 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 3 (10,000 - 12,000 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 8 (11,500 - 12,345 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 10 (1,242 - 2,106 & 9,931-11,102 & 16,322 - 16,737 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 16 6,178 - 6,983 Kbp) are unknown.
